homePage.mainTitle: Zeinte (formerly AdivinaExamen): Your Smart Ally to Pass Exams
homePage.subtitle: Transform your notes and past exams into a powerful study tool. Upload your documents, and our AI in Zeinte will analyze the content, predict key questions, and help you prepare like never before.
homePage.step1Description: PDFs, DOCXs, TXTs... all your study material is welcome in Zeinte.
homePage.step2Description: Let our AI in Zeinte identify crucial information and predict questions.
homePage.step3Description: Practice with questions and detailed explanations in Zeinte.
homePage.choosePlanSubtitle: Start for free or unlock the full potential of Zeinte with our Pro Plan.
homePage.freeTrialDescription: Ideal for getting started and exploring Zeinte. During our Beta phase, enjoy more benefits!
homePage.proPlanFeature5: Save and manage your exams and analyses (future).
homePage.subscribeProAlert: Pro subscription functionality for Zeinte coming soon. Enjoy the Beta in the meantime!
homePage.revolutionizeStudyTitle: Ready to Revolutionize Your Study with Zeinte?
homePage.revolutionizeStudySubtitle: Stop guessing and start preparing with the artificial intelligence of Zeinte (formerly AdivinaExamen).
homePage.testimonialsTitle: What Our Users Say About Zeinte
homePage.testimonial1Quote: It has changed the way I prepare for my civil service exams. The question prediction is incredibly accurate and saves me a ton of time.
homePage.testimonial2Quote: As a university student, it helps me focus on what's truly important in my notes. The AI explanations are super clear.
homePage.testimonial3Quote: I used to spend hours trying to guess what might be on the exam. Now, I get a clear idea in minutes. Highly recommended!
homePage.testimonial4Quote: For preparing for the MIR (medical residency exam), every minute counts. This tool gives me a direct focus on the most likely topics and their possible questions.
homePage.testimonial5Quote: Studying for IT certifications is dense. Being able to upload manuals and get relevant multiple-choice questions is a huge advantage.
homePage.testimonial6Quote: Even for reviewing high school concepts before university, it's useful. It helps me understand better and not get lost in the details.

features.uploadDocsShort: Upload exams, syllabi, and notes (PDF, DOCX, TXT) to Zeinte.
features.uploadDocsLong: Drag and drop or select files from your device. Zeinte will process multiple formats to extract relevant information and prepare it for intelligent analysis.
features.deepAnalysisShort: Zeinte's AI identifies key themes and patterns from past exams.
features.deepAnalysisLong: Our artificial intelligence in Zeinte examines the content of your documents, identifying recurring themes, frequently asked questions, and the overall course structure. If it detects past exams, it analyzes their methodology and the relative importance of topics.
features.smartPredictionShort: Zeinte generates multiple-choice questions that might appear on your exam.
features.smartPredictionLong: Based on exhaustive analysis, Zeinte predicts possible exam questions. These questions are designed to mimic the style, difficulty, and format of real tests, giving you a unique advantage.
features.clearExplanationsShort: Understand each answer with professor-like explanations thanks to Zeinte.
features.clearExplanationsLong: For each multiple-choice question predicted, Zeinte's AI generates a detailed explanation. It not only tells you the correct answer but also reasons why it's correct and why other options are incorrect, as if you had a personal tutor.
features.interactiveStudyShort: View questions, answer, and get instant feedback in Zeinte.
features.interactiveStudyLong: Study efficiently with an interface designed for learning in Zeinte. Answer questions, check your correct and incorrect answers, and access detailed explanations to reinforce your knowledge.
features.customConfigShort: Tailor exam generation in Zeinte to your needs (number of questions).
features.customConfigLong: Adjust the default number of multiple-choice questions you want generated in Zeinte. These values will be used unless you change them at the time of generation.
features.studyCommunityShort: Explore forums and learn from others in the Zeinte community (current simulation).
features.studyCommunityLong: Access our Zeinte community section where you'll find simulated discussion forums with relevant topics for various competitive exams and studies. In the future, you'll be able to interact and share your own experiences.

dashboardPage.title: Study Dashboard - Zeinte
dashboardPage.emptySubtitle: It seems you haven't analyzed any documents yet in Zeinte. Upload your notes, syllabi, or exams to start studying intelligently!

dashboardPage.startNewAnalysisDescription: Upload your documents, notes, or past exams for AI to generate predictions and study material.

fileUploadArea.uploadManuallyDescription: Select files (.pdf, .doc, .docx, .txt, images) from your device.

configurePage.title: Configure Your Exam in Zeinte

configurePage.reanalyzeWarningDescription: The "Re-analyze and Generate New Exam" feature in the Zeinte Study Dashboard depends on the text content of previously uploaded documents. This content is saved in your browser's local storage, which has size limits (usually 5-10MB). If original documents are very large or numerous, they might not be fully saved, and the re-analysis function might not have enough data.

adminPage.accessDeniedDescription: You do not have permission to access this section.

adminPage.deleteUserDisclaimerDescription: The "Delete User" function in this panel only removes the user's record from the Firestore database ('users' collection). **It does not delete the account from Firebase Authentication.** For complete deletion, you would need to use the Firebase Admin SDK in a secure backend environment.

adminAppSettingsPage.maxFilesUploadLabel: Maximum number of files to upload:

adminAppSettingsPage.defaultAiModelDescription: For analysis and prediction. Affects the question prediction flow.

adminAppSettingsPage.configSavedToastDescriptionFileUploadLim: File upload limits have been updated.
adminAppSettingsPage.invalidValuesToastDescription: Limits must be positive numbers. Temperature must be between 0 and 1.
adminAppSettingsPage.firestoreSecurityRulesFooter: Remember to configure Firestore security rules to allow the admin to write to `appSettings/globalConfig` and authenticated users (or AI flows if running with service identity) to read it.
adminAppSettingsPage.maintenanceModeDescription: When active, only administrators can use the application.
adminAppSettingsPage.allowNewSignupsDescription: Disable this to prevent new users from signing up.
adminAppSettingsPage.maxPdfDownloadsDescription: PDF download limit for Pro users.

authContext.firebaseGeneralConfigError: General Firebase Configuration Error: The application could not connect correctly. This is usually due to missing or incorrect environment variables (NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_...) in '.env.local'. Please check your '.env.local' file and server console logs. After correcting the .env.local file, you MUST RESTART your development server. Authentication and database functions will not work until this is resolved.
authContext.firebaseServicesUnavailable: AuthContext: Firebase services are not configured or available. Authentication functions will be disabled.
authContext.firebaseAuthOrDbError: AuthContext: Critical error - Firebase auth or firestore service instance is not defined. Authentication will not work correctly.
authContext.authConfigNotFoundGoogle: Google provider configuration error (auth/configuration-not-found). Ensure the Google sign-in provider is correctly enabled and configured in your Firebase Console (Authentication -> Sign-in method -> Google -> Enable). You might also need to configure the OAuth consent screen in Google Cloud Console.
authContext.unauthorizedDomainError: Unauthorized domain error (auth/unauthorized-domain). The domain you are trying to authenticate from is not on the list of authorized domains in your Firebase Console. Go to Firebase Console -> Authentication -> Settings (or Sign-in method -> Authorized domains) and add your domain (e.g., 'localhost' for development).
authContext.operationNotAllowedError: Operation not allowed (auth/operation-not-allowed). Ensure the sign-in method you are trying to use (e.g., Email/Password or Google) is enabled in your Firebase Console (Authentication -> Sign-in method).
authContext.emailInUseError: This email address is already in use.
authContext.invalidEmailError: The email address format is invalid.
authContext.weakPasswordError: The password is too weak. It must be at least 6 characters long.
authContext.userNotFoundError: Incorrect credentials. Please check your email and password.
authContext.popupBlockedError: The Google popup was blocked or canceled. Please enable popups for this site and try again.
authContext.accountExistsWithDifferentCredentialErro: An account already exists with this email but with a different sign-in method (e.g., Google or password). Try signing in with the original method.
authContext.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred ({{errorCode}}). Please try again. If the problem persists, check the Firebase configuration.
authContext.handleSubmitGenericError: An unexpected error occurred while trying to log in. Please try again.
authContext.logoutAttemptFailedConfigOrAuth: AuthContext: Logout attempt failed because Firebase is not configured or auth service is unavailable.
authContext.logoutSuccessToastDescription: You have been successfully logged out.
authContext.firestoreUnavailableSaveUser: AuthContext: Firestore DB instance is not available, cannot save user.
authContext.tooManyRequestsError: Too many failed login attempts. Please try again later or reset your password.
authContext.tooManyRequestsResendEmailError: You have tried to resend the verification email too many times. Please wait a moment before trying again.
authContext.resendVerificationNotLoggedIn: You must be logged in to resend the verification email.
authContext.resendVerificationGoogleUser: Google users do not require email verification through this method.
authContext.resendVerificationSuccess: Verification email resent to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and spam folder.
authContext.updateTierErrorNoUserOrDb: User not found or database not available to update plan.
authContext.updateTierErrorAdminLock: The main administrator's plan cannot be modified this way.
authContext.updateTierErrorSpecialProLock: This special Pro user cannot change their plan directly. Contact an administrator.
authContext.updateTierErrorFirestoreMessage: Could not update your plan in the database. Please try again.
authContext.updateInterestsErrorNoUserOrDb: User not found or database unavailable to update interests.
authContext.updateInterestsErrorFirestoreMessage: Could not update your interests in the database. Please try again.

upgradeProAlert.title: Unlock Pro Features in Zeinte!
upgradeProAlert.featureUnavailable: The "{{featureName}}" functionality is exclusive to the Pro Plan.

legal.disclaimerText: Zeinte is a study aid tool based on artificial intelligence. The generated results and predictions are for guidance purposes and do not guarantee success in any exam. The user is responsible for the use of the information provided. Search and Make S.L. is not responsible for errors, omissions, or interpretations of the generated content. We reserve the right to modify the application and its functionalities at any time. Usage data is collected anonymously to improve the application.

createPage.title: Create Custom Course with AI
createPage.descriptionForAllUsers: Define the main characteristics of your ideal course and let our AI propose an initial syllabus. Explore this functionality!

createPage.syllabusProposalDescription: This is an initial suggestion generated by the AI. Review it and decide if it fits your needs.
createPage.moduleContentPlaceholder: Detailed module content (the AI will develop this after acceptance).
createPage.preparingCourseDescription: Our AI is working on creating your custom course. This may take a few minutes.
